name: ats-pipeline
description: Monorepo root — install and run scripts only (see README.md)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:web
scripts.build:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build:web
scripts.start:api: npm --prefix backend run migrate && npm --prefix backend start
scripts.start:prod: SET NODE_ENV=production&& SET SERVE_STATIC=true&& npm run start:api
